history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right (`>`). The cell directly ahead at row 02 column C is lava, so I must not move forward. The safe path toward the goal at row 04 column D is to go down first, which means I need to turn right to face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing down. The cell directly ahead at row 03 column B is safe, while turning toward the goal would not be immediate. The best next step is to move forward into the open path.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing down. The goal `O` is at row 04 column D. Moving forward would take me to row 04 column B, which is safe, but I still need to navigate toward the goal. Since the goal is to the right, I should turn right to face right and then move toward it.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B, facing left (`<`). The cell directly to my left is a wall, so moving forward is impossible. The goal is at row 04 column D, and the safest immediate progress is to turn downward toward the open path rather than toward lava. To face down from left, I should turn left.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing down (`v`). The goal is at row 04 column D. Moving forward would take me to row 04 column B, which is safe, and it also brings me closer to the goal while avoiding the lava at C and D for now. So the next safe step is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing down. The goal is at row 04 column D, but the cell directly to my right at row 04 column C is lava, so I should not move right. The safe open path toward the goal is to go up into row 03, then move right around the lava and approach the goal from above or the side. Since I am facing down, I need to turn around to face up before moving.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B, facing right (`>`). The goal `O` is at row 04 column D, but the cell directly ahead at row 04 column C is lava `L`, so I cannot move forward safely. I need to change direction and use the safe open path above, so I will turn left to face up.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing up (`^`). The goal `O` is at row 04 column D. The cell directly ahead at row 03 column B is safe, so moving forward is the best next step toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B and facing up (`^`). The goal `O` is at row 04 column D. Moving forward would take me to row 02 column B, which is safe but moves away from the goal. To head toward the goal, I should face right, so I need to turn clockwise.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B, facing right. The goal is at row 04 column D. Moving forward would take me to row 03 column C, which is safe, and it moves me closer to the goal. I should move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column C, facing right (`>`). The goal `O` is at row 04 column D, which is directly down-right from me, but I cannot move diagonally. Moving forward would take me to row 03 column D, which is safe and brings me adjacent to the goal. From there I can move down toward the goal, but first I should step into the safe cell ahead.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column D, facing right (`>`). The goal `O` is directly below me at row 04 column D, so I need to face down first. Turning right will orient me downward without stepping into lava.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column D facing down (`v`). The goal `O` is directly below me at row 04 column D, and that cell is safe. I should move forward to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
